name: Code Generator Skill
description: A template skill for generating production-ready code

prompts.name: generate-function
prompts.content: Generate a production-ready function with proper error handling, documentation, and type definitions.

prompts.name: generate-class
prompts.content: Generate a complete class with constructor, methods, getters/setters, and proper documentation.

examples.input: function calculateTotal with parameters items (array) and taxRate (number)
examples.output: function calculateTotal(items: Item[], taxRate: number): number { const subtotal = items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.price, 0); return subtotal * (1 + taxRate); }
examples.explanation: Example of generating a typed function with proper implementation
